body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-0755", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-78", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')"}], "description": "Untrusted prompt input could reach the Gemini CLI @file parser, allowing read/exfiltration of arbitrary local files (@/etc/passwd, @~/.ssh/id_rsa, @../../secret). On Windows, unquoted cmd.exe metacharacters could break out into OS command injection.\n\nFix (1.1.6): removed the broken shell:false double-quote wrapping; added assertSafeFileReferences() to contain @file refs to the working directory; hardened Windows cmd.exe argument quoting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.03336, "percentile": 0.87069}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4h5r-5jm8-jxjm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T20:44:58Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4h5r-5jm8-jxjm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4h5r-5jm8-jxjm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-0755"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-18T20:44:58Z", "references": ["https://github.com/jamubc/gemini-mcp-tool/security/advisories/GHSA-4h5r-5jm8-jxjm", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-0755", "https://www.zerodayinitiative.com/advisories/ZDI-26-021", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4h5r-5jm8-jxjm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/jamubc/gemini-mcp-tool/security-advisories/GHSA-4h5r-5jm8-jxjm", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/jamubc/gemini-mcp-tool", "summary": "gemini-mcp-tool vulnerable to OS command injection and @file exfiltration via prompt quoting (CVE-2026-0755)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T20:44:59Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4h5r-5jm8-jxjm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.1.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "gemini-mcp-tool"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.1.2, < 1.1.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: gemini-mcp-tool vulnerable to OS command injection and @file exfiltration via prompt quoting (CVE-2026-0755)
